key_findings: 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md is the sole effective reimbursement policy; 2022 version (02) is explicitly repealed per Art.14, effective 2025-01-01.
Travel lodging caps (04 Art.4): 4 employee levels × 3 city tiers, ranging from ¥300 (employee, tier-3) to ¥1100 (executive, tier-1) per person per night.
Local transport per-day caps (04 Art.6): tier-1 ¥120, tier-2 ¥100, tier-3 ¥80.

Training course fee cap (05 Art.2): ≤¥3500 per person per course. Internal daily ≤¥800 (05 Art.3). External daily ≤¥1200 (05 Art.4). Training lodging (05 Art.5): tier-1 ¥500, tier-2 ¥420, tier-3 ¥350.
Business entertainment: per event ≤¥5000 (06 Art.2), per person ≤¥300 (06 Art.3).
Office supplies: ≤¥600 per person per month (07 Art.2). Communication: ≤¥300 per person per month (07 Art.3).
Exemption rule: 01 Art.12 — special_approval=true means the record has 专项审批 and the 1.0x standard cap does not constrain it; such records are exempt from over-standard checking.
Cross-reference confirmed: 04 Art.7 mandates training lodging uses 05 standards, not 04 lodging table.
